Sabaton

Ciphers

  • Enigma
  • Shamir Secret Sharing
  • RSA
  • Rabin
  • Vigenère

Welcome to Sabaton

Sabaton is an educational cryptography toolkit that lets you explore, encrypt, decrypt, and analyze messages using classical and modern ciphers.

What is this?

This project is built around a high-performance cryptographic backend written in C, exposed through a clean and accessible web interface.

How to use

  • Select a cipher from the left
  • Enter text and keys in the form
  • Encrypt or decrypt instantly

© 2026 Sabaton — Cryptography Playground
